chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP NO.D-6344, 5111, 5860, 6903, 7753, 8038 & 8347 OF 2019 824 & 4450 OF 2020 657, 797 & 4967 OF 2021 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 16.09.2021 Mr. Ziauddin Mujahid advocate Mr. Muhammad Ishaque advocate Mr. Mukesh Kumar advocate Mr. Tariq Masood advocate Mr. Waqas Asad Shaikh advocate Mr. Faheem Raza Memon advocate Mr. Qaim Ali Memon advocate Mr. Muhammad Rizwan Saeed advocate Mr. Altaf Ahmed advocate Mr. Muhammad Ramzan advocate Mr. Raja Jawwad Ali advocate. Syed Shehzad Ali Shah advocate. Dr. Liaquat Ali Abro and Mr. Nadeem Ahmed Qureshi, Law Officers, Law Department................ CMA No.7629/2020 for jointing as party while seeking same relief with consent of counsel for the petitioner is allowed. Amended title shall be filed. Mr. Mukesh Kumar files Vakalatnama in CP No.D-657 and 797 of 2021 are taken on record. To come up on 23.09.2021 at 11.00 a.m. Office shall place copy of this order in connected petition. J U D G E J U D G E IK
